case_title: COHEN, STEPHEN DDS et al VS SANDOVAL, IRMA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COHEN, STEPHEN DDS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, IRMA $968.99 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,033.99, DEFT LIABLE FOR DENTAL CHARGES WHERE INSURANCE CO FAILS TO PAY DENTAL CARE PROVIDED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $968.99 FILED BY COHEN, STEPHEN DDS WONG, SHANNON DDS, APDC AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, IRMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, IRMA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, IRMA
